method: 40-agent adversarial audit (parallel judges, web search on ambiguous pairs), stratified sample of 40 pairs (8 per bucket)
conclusion: Reliable AUTO tier = citta conf>=0.9 OR paese conf>=0.85 (~100% precision). All other matches are lower precision (chain-branch / same-city-different-property confusions) and must stay REVIEW.
falsePositivesFound: embassy suites denver International Airport vs Downtown Convention Center — different branches
